## Explanation

This code implements an **LRU (Least Recently Used) cache decorator** using an `OrderedDict` to store up to `maxsize` function results.

When a cached result exists, it's moved to the end of the ordered dict (marking it as most recently used); when the cache exceeds `maxsize`, the item at the front (least recently used) is evicted via `popitem(last=False)`.
